overview: NeXgro is a full-featured Instamart-style online grocery platform with a rich customer-facing shopping experience and a comprehensive admin dashboard. It includes loyalty programs, referrals, reviews, bundles, advanced authentication, promotions, multi-language support, dark mode, QR reorder, wishlist sharing, recipe shopping, subscription boxes, age-gated products, live delivery tracking, and much more.
features: Cart & Checkout with tip, CoD, and live savings tracker
Live delivery agent map (simulated GPS tracking)
Push notification prompts for order events
